## Summary / 摘要

Describe the change in one or two sentences.  
请用一两句话描述本次变更。

## Type of change / 变更类型

- [ ] Feature / 新功能
- [ ] Bug fix / 缺陷修复
- [ ] Documentation / 文档
- [ ] Refactor / 重构
- [ ] Sample data / 样例数据

## Engineering checklist / 工程检查清单

- [ ] Units are documented for any new metric. / 新增指标已说明单位。
- [ ] Risk model changes are explainable. / 风险模型变更可解释。
- [ ] No private project data is included. / 未包含私有项目数据。
- [ ] The static page still opens without a build step. / 静态页面仍可无需构建直接打开。

## Screenshots / 截图

Add screenshots or exported reports if the UI changed.  
如 UI 有变化，请添加截图或导出的报告。
